creator: caelian@gmail.com
text:
DUring downloads of large documentrs over my USB WLAN interface (if_ural
driver) the system occasionally breaks down because of kernel-panics.

How-To-Repeat: Usually downloading a rather large document through USB WLAN interface triggers the crashes, e.g. diablo-jdk15, firefox etc.
